candidates.why: Best available top-line revenue-like measure for a bank; represents total operating income rather than product sales revenue.

variables.notes: No REVT candidates were provided. For a bank, the closest top-line concept is total operating income. Chosen from the full A-column preview outside the candidate list, so manual review is required.
No clear COGS/cost of sales concept is present. This appears to be a bank, where COGS is typically not separately reported.

candidates.why: Best explicit overhead/administrative expense line; populated and broader SG&A bucket than the other component candidates.
SG&A-related label, but appears to be a component/sub-bucket within broader administrative expenses.
Overhead-related but narrower and supplementary versus the main administrative expense line.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit populated SG&A-type row only, per hierarchy rule. Excluded depreciation/amortization and broader totals.

candidates.why: Development-related asset balance, not an income statement R&D expense.
Balance sheet amortization account, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No research and development expense line is visible on the provided statements. Candidate labels are balance-sheet/equity items, not R&D expense.

candidates.why: Direct match to interest expense and the broad reported line item.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense, deposits from the public
candidates.why: Specific component of interest expense, less preferred than the total line.
Specific component of interest expense, less preferred than the total line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Lease interest component, not the main interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease interest disclosure, not the main reported line.

variables.notes: Used the main total interest expense line as the preferred reported item.

candidates.row_label: Total equity attributable to the owners of the Parent Company
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, which avoids double counting with MIB.
Acceptable fallback only if owner/parent equity is unavailable.
Not equity; full balance sheet total.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to the owners of the Parent Company

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity to exclude non-controlling interests. Included Total equity as lower-priority fallback for years where the parent-only label may be unavailable.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet label for minority/non-controlling interest.
Alternative label for the same concept.
Income statement allocation line, less preferred than balance-sheet presentation for MIB.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income allocation line, not book minority interest.

variables.notes: Selected balance-sheet minority interest labels as priority list. Excluded income-statement allocation lines.
